title: Segment Leader, Client Solutions
description:
GLG is seeking a Segment Lead for our Professional Services Firm (PSF) Client Solutions team in Singapore with the objective of leading the team in the mid to long-term. The successful candidate should be well-placed to exceed commercial, development, compliance and people target. In addition, he or she will execute and manage research inquiries coming from our client firms based in Southeast Asia. Finally, the Segment Lead will collaborate with Business Development in expanding our presence in the region, and work with the region’s leadership team in developing and implementing business performance improvement initiatives.

Specific responsibilities include (but are not limited to):

  • Develop and implement a business plan in close collaboration with our Leadership team, Sales team, and other GLG stakeholders to achieve Commercial Targets.
  • Build a high-performing team that’s scaled from Gurugram, aligned to our global PSF strategy
  • Track team performance and create plans to accelerate growth and revenue near and long term.
  • Take ownership of a book of clients in the Professional Services and Consulting space and deliver consistently high-class client service and lead by example.
  • Ensure best in class client service practices are upheld through close coaching of team members and support direct reports in their professional development plans, actively managing team performance and people development.
  • Facilitate high value engagements between GLG experts (including industry executives, independent consultants, academics, and former policy makers across all sectors) and our clients while maintaining industry leading standards in Compliance.
  • Support the Sales team growing GLG client relationships in Singapore including new clients as well as senior stakeholders. This relationship development will stem from proactive phone outreach, project execution, post project client feedback, and occasionally in person client meetings in partnership with Sales.
  • Work closely with the Global PSF leadership to align on global strategy for each account and drive great execution of that strategy for Southeast Asia PSF
  • Work closely with the GLG Councils Team by developing relationships with GLG’s most respected thought leaders and business professionals.
  • Program live in country meetings or teleconferences on relevant subject matter and newsworthy events to our clients in collaboration with Sales.

An ideal candidate will have the following:

  • 6+ years of experience, ideally in consulting, banking, information services, market research, or other professional services or start up environment

Bachelor’s degree, or higher

  • Strong go-getter attitude and track record of business growth turnaround
  • Proven ability to manage and motivate a team of client service professionals both strategically and tactfully.
  • Successful track record of working in fast paced, client service environment with a passion for problem solving and a consistent client centric mind-set
  • Demonstrated commercial acumen and interest, in some or all the following areas: Sales, negotiation, or networking with high-end professionals; and/or Business development, corporate development, product development, Product and project management
  • Ability to multi-task and prioritise activities effectively, while ensuring a high level of accuracy and attention to detail
  • Outstanding communication skills and willingness to engage senior professionals as a knowledge and research partner.

We seek bright, proactive, and flexible people who also:

  • Act with the highest integrity and professionalism in all their endeavors
  • Express a strong desire to work within and lead a team
  • Demonstrate the ability and initiative to handle increasing responsibility over time including multiple stakeholder management
  • Think creatively and focus on opportunities for accelerated growth
  • Exhibit relentless attention to detail

postedCompany.description:
G

About GLG / Gerson Lehrman Group

GLG is the world's leading platform for professional learning. Business leaders, investors, consultants, social entrepreneurs, and other top professionals rely on GLG to learn in short- and long-term engagements from a membership of more than 500,000 experts. Clients partner with GLG to address their most complex strategic challenges, make better business decisions, and advance their careers through conversations, mentorships, small group convenings, surveys, and other interactions—all within a rigorous compliance framework. Global, technology-driven, and nimble, GLG’s employees work in 22 offices in 12 countries.

We believe strongly in our mission- and values-driven culture. Our core values drive our success. They are: learning & curiosity, responsibility, courage, judgment, fresh perspective, service, and integrity.

To learn more, visit www.GLG.it.

Notes: GLG does not allow employees to trade public equities or debt.  All prospective new hires are required to undergo a background check.
